records.ety: [Perhaps fr. OF. avalant descending, hanging down, p. pr. of avaler to go down, let down, descend (cf. Avalanche); but probably from the town of Valence in France.]

defs: Hanging drapery for a bed, couch, window, or the like, especially that which hangs around a bedstead, from the bed to the floor.
quotes: Valance of Venice gold in needlework.

defs: The drooping edging of the lid of a trunk, which covers the joint when the lid is closed.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Valanced (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Valancing (?).]

defs: To furnish with a valance; to decorate with hangings or drapery.
quotes: His old fringed chair valanced around with party-colored worsted bobs.
